title: ACT Node envelope
description: Per PRD-100-R21, PRD-100-R22, PRD-100-R23, PRD-100-R24, PRD-100-R28, PRD-100-R31. Node envelope shape with the eight Core required fields. ID grammar per PRD-100-R10/R11/R13, extended for variant IDs per PRD-102-R29 (single `@` separator allowed; conservative interpretation pending amendment A6). `summary_source` is open per PRD-100-R23/PRD-102-R12. Content blocks are open-ended (PRD-100-R28: type discriminator required); per-type field shapes are owned by PRD-102. `related` items follow PRD-102-R18 ({id, relation}); the inline schema in PRD-100 is array-of-strings and is superseded here pending amendment A5. `metadata` is open per PRD-100-R22 and PRD-108-R7. Children-cycle prohibition (PRD-100-R25) is not expressible in JSON Schema; PRD-600 enforces it programmatically.

id.description: Per PRD-100-R10, PRD-100-R11. Lowercase ASCII alphanumeric + dot/underscore/hyphen/slash. Optional `@<variant_key>` suffix per PRD-102-R29 (variant_key matches `[a-z0-9-]+`). Pending amendment A6 to align PRD-100-R10 with PRD-102-R29.

type.description: Open enum; see PRD-100 for well-known values. Custom types MUST be namespaced (`acme:thing`).

summary_source.description: Open enum (PRD-100). Well-known: `llm`, `author`, `extracted`. Adding values is MINOR per PRD-108-R4(3).

parent.description: Per PRD-100-R10, PRD-100-R24. Variant-ID extension per PRD-102-R29 (amendment A6).

children.description: Per PRD-100-R24, PRD-100-R25. Variant-ID extension per PRD-102-R29 (amendment A6). Cycles prohibited (PRD-100-R25) — enforced programmatically by PRD-600.

related.description: Per PRD-102-R18, PRD-102-R19, PRD-102-R20. Cross-references to other nodes; cycles permitted (consumer-side cycle detection required). Supersedes PRD-100's inline array-of-strings shape per amendment A5.

id.description: Per PRD-100-R10 plus variant extension (amendment A6).

relation.description: Per PRD-102-R19 (open enum). Well-known: see-also, supersedes, variant_of, child_of, parent_of, translation_of, has-variant. Adding values is MINOR per PRD-108-R4(3).

type.description: Block type. Core canonical: `markdown`, `prose`, `code`, `data`, `callout`. Plus namespace: `marketing:*` (documented-open). Unknown types MUST be tolerated per PRD-108-R7.
